titleStmt.title: SII 22.230: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 230. (A.R. No. 230 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, GINGEE TALUK, EYIL. ON A STONE SET UP TO THE LEFT SIDE ON THE WAY TO THE HILL.

summary.p: This is merely dated in the cyclic year Plavaṅga. It records the formation of a street called the Śrī Bhaṇḍārināyakap-perunderu on the dēvadāna lands at Eyil for the colonisation of weavers therein on specified terms of taxes per loom to be paid by them to the temple year by year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
plavaṅka varuṣam taiy mātam
10 2- tiyati Eyyil tirumaṭaiviḷāka
ttil caṉnatiyil termuṭṭikku kiḻa
kkutteruvum teṟku vaṭakku Āṉa
teru tevatāṉamuḷḷamaṭṭum [śrī]
paṇṭārināyakapperumteru Āka ka
ṭṭuvikkaiyil Inta teruvil E
ṟum kaikkoḷakkuṭikku cakala O
pātiyum Uḷpaṭak kuṭi Eṟi varucattu
kku taṟi Oṉṟukku � 1 Itukku Etirām Āṇ
ṭaikku � 2 Itan Etirāmāṇṭaikku � 3
Eṉṟeṉṟaikkum Immatikāri ko
ḷḷakkaṭavatākavum Uḷḷupātikkum Iṉa
varikkum Āyattukkum Ūraṟṟa matikāri
yil Oṉṟupāti koḷḷakkaṭavatākavum
caṉtirātittavaraiyum Immatikāri koḷḷa
kkaṭavatākavum Itukku Akutampaṇṇi
ṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyil kārām
pacuvai koṉṟavaṉ pāvattile po
kakaṭavanṉākavum
Digital edition of SII 22.230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
